name: Mediterranean Stir-Fry with Angel Hair Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Reserve 1 tablespoon of fresh basil for garnish.
3. In a food processor or blender, whisk together crushed tomatoes, garlic, cayenne, and remaining basil until smooth.
4. Heat vegetable oil spray in a wok or skillet over medium-high heat. When the pan is hot and smoking, add onion and eggplant. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Add zucchini, red pepper, and artichoke hearts to the pan. Stir-fry for an additional 3-4 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Remove the vegetables from the pan and set aside.
8. Pour the reserved sauce over the cooked vegetables.
9. Place bread in the oven to warm.
10. Add pasta to boiling water (1 minute if fresh, or 5 minutes if dried) and cook according to package instructions until al dente. Drain well.
11. Return the drained pasta to the pan. When the wok is smoking hot, add sesame oil and toss the pasta for 2 minutes, ensuring it remains crisp.
12. Divide the pasta into serving portions and place on individual plates.
13. Spoon the vegetables over the pasta.
14. Sprinkle with reserved fresh basil.
15. Serve with warm bread.
